_comments.build_app.sh: Build the app. SwiftPM's internal sandbox-exec collides with Claude's tool sandbox, so this needs to run outside the sandbox.
_comments.build_icon.sh: Regenerate AppIcon.icns from AppIcon.svg. Only runs when the .icns is missing or the logo changes.
_comments.qlmanage: Rasterize SVG to PNG via Quick Look. Called by build_icon.sh; sandbox blocks the Quick Look XPC service.
_comments.pkill -x Cadence: Kill the running app instance before relaunching the rebuilt one. Sandbox blocks sysmond (process listing).
_comments.open Cadence.app: Launch the rebuilt app via Launch Services. Sandbox blocks runningboardd XPC.
_comments.pgrep -lf Cadence: Check whether Cadence is currently running. Same sysmond block as pkill.
_comments.ps aux: Inspect running processes during debugging. Same sysmond block as pkill.
_comments.killall Finder Dock: Refresh Finder/Dock icon caches after AppIcon.icns changes. macOS aggressively caches .icns lookups.
_comments.git status/diff/log: Read-only inspection of the repo state. Used constantly during iteration; no reason to prompt.
_comments.git add/commit/init/config: Repo-modifying commands scoped to this repo. Commit auto-signs with the personal GPG key via the includeIf in ~/.gitconfig.
_comments.deny git push --force / reset --hard: Destructive git operations always require explicit user approval, even though the safer variants are allowed.
_comments.deny pkill/killall: Block broad process-killing commands so the allowlist above can't be reused for unrelated targets. Deny rules take precedence over allow rules.
